allow: PowerShell(npm ls astro @astrojs/react 2>$null; Write-Output "=== LATEST ==="; Write-Output \("astro latest: " + \(npm view astro version\)\); Write-Output \("astro dist-tags:"\); npm view astro dist-tags --json; Write-Output \("@astrojs/react latest: " + \(npm view @astrojs/react version\)\); Write-Output \("@astrojs/react peer deps:"\); npm view @astrojs/react@latest peerDependencies --json)

PowerShell(Write-Output \("node: " + \(node -v\)\); Write-Output "=== astro@7 engines/peers ==="; npm view astro@7.0.3 engines peerDependencies --json; Write-Output "=== astro@6 latest version ==="; npm view astro@6 version; Write-Output "=== @astrojs/react@5 + @6 astro peer ==="; npm view @astrojs/react@5 peerDependencies --json; npm view @astrojs/react@6.0.0 peerDependencies --json)
